label: Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment

node.label: Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
node.definition: Edge and on-device deployment runs models near sensors or users under strict power, memory, latency, connectivity, privacy, and thermal constraints.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment is to connect Quantized inference & compressed deployment, GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators to downstream capabilities including Robotics & embodied AI, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
examples: substrate for Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Quantized inference & compressed deployment, GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators.

dependencies.rationale: Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns Quantized inference & compressed deployment into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns Spiking neural networks into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns Formal verification of models into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns Runtime assurance, monitors & safety envelopes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment turns Knowledge distillation, pruning & sparsification into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
